# FPS Unlock - Perfect Vanilla 1.21.4
💡This modpack ensures Minecraft's performance without sacrificing stability and the atmosphere of vanilla gameplay
 
Modpack includes vanilla-enhancing mods and visual additions that make the game more comfortable for vanilla gameplay!


💎 Shaders
🔦 Dynamic Lighting
🌏World Generation Optimization
⚡Entity and particle Optimization

# Mods:
- Attack Through Grass
- Better Statistics Screen
- Blur+
- ChatAnimation
- ClickThrough Plus
- Clumps
- Euphoria Patches
- Lighty
- More Chat History
- Item Scroller
- Shulker Box Tooltip
- Skin Layers 3D 
- Tax Free Levels
- Trade Cycling
- Xaero's World Map
- Zoomify
- And more...
 

Shaders:
- Complementary Shaders - Reimagined
- Complementary Shaders - Unbound
- BSL Shaders
